name: harness-gap-eval-pack
description: SWE-grade evaluation pack for the NixOS-Dev-Quick-Deploy AI harness. Covers NixOS module patterns, agent orchestration, Python async, workflow reasoning, and tool-call analysis.

cases.query: Explain lib.mkIf and lib.mkForce in NixOS modules in 3 bullet points
Explain nix flake inputs follows lock behavior
Describe the phases in an agent workflow session: discover, plan, implement, validate
How does aiohttp handle concurrent HTTP requests in an async Python server?
Explain exponential backoff retry policy with max_attempts and backoff_factor
How do Nix overlays work and what is the correct way to add a package override?
What is the difference between plan-readonly and execute-mutating safety modes in an agent runtime?
Explain how git worktrees provide workspace isolation for parallel agent coding tasks
What is SystemD DynamicUser and when should you NOT use it in a NixOS service?
Describe how a tool-call in an LLM agent is represented: name, input parameters, and output
